title: Java Programming TA
description: Assist the Java programming course, answer lab questions, help review basic OOP exercises, and support weekly office hours.
requirements: Completed Java or OOP course with strong grades. Able to explain concepts clearly and work with first-year students.

title: Python Data Analysis TA
description: Support Python data analysis classes, help students use pandas and matplotlib, and prepare small practice datasets.
requirements: Experience with Python, data cleaning, charts, and basic statistics.

title: English Conversation Lab TA
description: Facilitate small-group English speaking practice and help students prepare short presentations.
requirements: Fluent spoken English, patient communication style, and experience leading group activities.

title: Robotics Club Mentor
description: Help supervise robotics club activities, support Arduino experiments, and guide students during project sessions.
requirements: Basic electronics knowledge and experience with Arduino or robotics projects.

title: Math Homework Clinic TA
description: Provide after-school math homework support and collect common questions for the teacher.
requirements: Strong algebra and calculus foundation. Able to tutor patiently in one-on-one or small-group settings.
